zotero.abstractNote: We present a dataset of real-robot trajectories for the purpose of benchmarking the transferability of learned dynamics models. The dataset consists of trajectories from a 7-DOF manipulator (KUKA LBR iiwa) performing reaching tasks under different conditions, such as varying payloads and friction settings. We provide the data in a standardized format and include baseline results for several state-of-the-art dynamics learning methods. Our goal is to facilitate research in transfer learning and robust control by providing a common benchmark for evaluating how well learned models generalize to unseen dynamics.
